fontSize 1100
labelFontSize 200

# ==== Box: U+0453
strokeWidth 20
strokeColor 9E9E9E
drawRectangle pen 0 1440 1400 -900 stroke
glyphMode fill
drawGlyph pen 484 0 /uni0453
drawLabel pen 700 -800 center "U+0453"
move 1400
